hero.title: Master Professional English.
hero.subtitle: Expert 1-on-1 coaching for intermediate+ Russian-speaking professionals ready to communicate with confidence at the international level.

how.title: How It Works
how.step1_desc: A 20-minute call to understand your goals, current level, and professional context. No commitment required.
how.step2_desc: Katsiaryna evaluates your English level, identifies your specific gaps, and builds a structured plan around your role and objectives.
how.step3_desc: 50-minute sessions focused on your real-world needs: presentations, negotiations, emails, or executive presence. Progress measured every month.

packages.title: Choose Your Path
packages.subtitle: Transparent pricing. No hidden fees. Built for busy professionals.

about.title: Meet Your Coach
about.subtitle: Bilingual educator. Business professional. Results-focused coach.
about.bio: Katsiaryna is a native Russian speaker who built her career in international marketing across the MEA region before dedicating herself to coaching. Having navigated complex corporate environments in English herself, she understands exactly what Russian-speaking professionals need to succeed on the global stage.
about.bio2: I don't teach grammar rules. I teach the confidence, the vocabulary, and the cultural intelligence that opens doors.
about.bio_long: With over 10 years of experience working in B2B marketing and communications across the UAE and Europe, Katsiaryna brings a unique perspective: she has lived the exact challenges her clients face. She holds the Cambridge CELTA certification and has coached over 500 professionals — from startup founders to C-suite executives — at companies including Giesecke+Devrient and across multiple industries.
about.creds: CELTA Certified · 10+ Years Corporate Experience · 500+ Professionals Coached · Dubai-based · Teaching Worldwide
about.feature1: 1-on-1 sessions tailored to your role and industry
about.feature2: Business English for negotiations, presentations & leadership
about.faq1_q: Do I need to be advanced to work with you?
about.faq1_a: No. Katsiaryna works with intermediate (B1+) and above. If you can hold a basic conversation in English, you're ready to start.
about.faq2_q: How quickly will I see results?
about.faq2_a: Most students notice a significant improvement in confidence and fluency after 4–6 sessions. Measurable progress is tracked monthly.
about.faq3_a: All sessions are online via video call (Zoom or Google Meet), making it easy to fit into your schedule anywhere in the world.
about.faq4_a: It depends on your goals: executive presentations, negotiations, job interviews, email writing, leadership communication, or confidence-building. Every curriculum is bespoke.

testimonials.title: Success Stories
testimonials.subtitle: Real professionals. Real results.
testimonials.t1_quote: Katsiaryna completely changed my approach to English in meetings. Within 3 months I went from avoiding speaking to leading international presentations. I got promoted 6 months after we started.
testimonials.t2_quote: I was silent in meetings because I was afraid of making mistakes. After 8 sessions with Katsiaryna, I'm now the one facilitating cross-functional calls in English.
testimonials.t3_quote: I closed a $2M deal entirely in English after 3 months of coaching. The ROI is impossible to calculate. Best investment I've made in my career.

faq.title: Common Questions
faq.a1: This coaching is designed for Russian-speaking professionals at intermediate level (B1) and above who need English for their career — managers, executives, engineers, founders, and business professionals.
faq.a2: Each session is 50 minutes, delivered via video call. Sessions are scheduled weekly or bi-weekly depending on your package.
faq.q3: What makes this different from a language school?
faq.a3: Unlike group classes or language apps, every session is 1-on-1 and built entirely around your specific professional context, industry vocabulary, and career goals.
faq.q4: Can I get a refund if it's not for me?
faq.a4: Yes. If after your first session you feel it's not the right fit, we will refund the remaining amount in full.
faq.q5: Do you teach Business English only?
faq.a5: The focus is professional and business English. Topics include presentations, negotiations, email communication, job interviews, leadership language, and executive presence.
